name: Brittany Mixed Fish Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Mixed fish (flounder, mackerel, cod, or haddock)
6 medium potatoes (peeled and cut into quarters)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish into chunks of equal size.
2. In a large kettle, sauté onions and garlic in heated butter or margarine until tender.
3. Add potatoes, water, bay leaves, thyme, marjoram, parsley, salt, and pepper to the pot. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to moderate and add the prepared fish. Cook, covered, for about 25 minutes, or until the fish and potatoes are tender.
5. Remove and discard the bay leaves.
6. Serve slices of crusty French bread in wide soup plates. Ladle the broth over the bread.
7. Serve fish and potatoes separately on a platter.
8. Serves 6 to 8.
